title: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) analyst forecast consensus shows Strong Buy rating with price targets ranging from $4 to $6 per share. Consensus ratings and targets reflect bullish outlook from Wall Street research community. Key driver of positive sentiment: strong clinical evidence base (28+ publications in Q1 2026 alone), expanding reimbursement coverage (two active CPT codes), improving unit economics (flow cell sales growing 20%+ annually), path to profitability visible by 2027-2028. Stock forecast summary: upside potential 200-400% from current levels, bull case driven by adoption acceleration, margin expansion, and installed base leverage, bear case reflects execution risks and near-term funding needs. Analyst price targets suggest significant value creation opportunity for early investors. Buy/hold recommendations prevalent among analysts citing: improving fundamentals, strategic focus on profitable customers, balance sheet improvements, and long-term market opportunity.
